'''''Fidelity''''' was a [[Thranta-class War Cruiser|''Thranta''-class War Cruiser]] and the sister ship of [[Valiant (Thranta-class War Cruiser)|''Valiant'']] and [[Courage (Thranta-class War Cruiser)|''Courage'']]. Manned by droid crews, the three ships served as the escort of the [[Alderaanian War Frigate]] ''[[Another Chance]]'', which was carrying all of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] leftover weapons after the world disarmed in the wake of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. When the ''Another Chance'' was located by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizers and its weapons given to the struggling Alliance in the wake of the [[Battle of Derra IV]], ''Fidelity'' was left to wander the [[Alderaan system/Legends|Alderaan system]].
